result:
**Corpus:** 15 microservices (cache-warmer, search-indexer, session-manager, user-profile-service, metrics-collector, auth-service, audit-logger, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, webhook-relay, export-pipeline, billing-worker, ingest-api, report-builder) across 6 environments (dev, QA, green/blue, canary, staging, prod). Operations tracked: scaling, upgrades, migrations, health checks, patches, downgrades, drains, pauses, resumes, rollbacks, reconfigurations, redeployments, restarts. Outcomes documented: success/failure, test passage, performance, warnings/errors, rate stabilization, alert clearing, latency normalization. 16 reference IDs recorded.

**Status:** ~50+ operations logged with timestamps spanning 09:15–16:20 and detailed outcomes (memory pressure, queue recovery, latency, alerts, retries, customer impact). No explicit analysis objective stated; awaiting clarification on what querying/analysis is needed to proceed.
